chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appln No.S-415 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2603/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of CMA No.2604/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 19-5-2025 Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for the petitioner -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is granted. 2 to 4. Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Bhutto, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the complainant, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant has left the Court due to threats by the complainant party, which, though no formal notice was issued, are stated to be present in the Court. He further submits that, for the time being, he does not press the instant Criminal Bail Application, with liberty to file afresh. In view of above, the instant Crl. Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. However, the applicant is at liberty to file fresh, in accordance with law. J U D G E Naveed Ali
